title: Software Engineer
description:

title: Software Developer (Remote)
description:
* **Role:** 
 Software Developer (Remote)
* **Location:** 
 Remote (Work from Anywhere)
* **Payout:** 
 $180k \\- $250k/yr



  





**Role Overview:** 




 We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Software Engineer, New Grad to work on a full\\-time basis. This early\\-career role is designed for recent graduates to build real products while contributing to and gradually owning core product features end\\-to\\-end. The position focuses on improving an AI recruiter agent, shaping its operations, scalability, and delivery of value to users, with mentorship from experienced engineers. The work directly impacts the development of frontier AI models by enabling domain experts to contribute training data, evaluations, and feedback loops across domains like finance, healthcare, and engineering.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 • Design and develop fullstack systems powering core product workflows with guidance from senior engineers.
 



 • Build and maintain backend services and APIs, emphasizing clean, maintainable code and scalability.
 



 • Develop and ship user\\-facing features and interfaces that directly serve real users.
 



 • Support data modeling efforts to optimize database performance and scalability.
 



 • Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to integrate and refine AI\\-driven workflows.
 



 • Contribute to the continuous improvement of an AI recruiter agent used globally.
 



 • Adhere to best practices in software development, testing, and deployment.
 



 • Participate in code reviews, documentation, and knowledge\\-sharing sessions.
 



 • Work within PST timezone overlap to ensure seamless collaboration with global teams.
 



  





**Required Skills \\& Qualifications:** 




 • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field from a recent graduation (within the last 2 years).
 



 • Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript with hands\\-on experience in React for building user interfaces.
 



 • Experience developing backend services using Node.js and RESTful APIs.
 



 • Familiarity with cloud platforms, specifically AWS services such as EC2, Lambda, and RDS.
 



 • Knowledge of relational databases including PostgreSQL and query optimization techniques.
 



 • Understanding of DevOps practices, including CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure as code.
 



 • Strong problem\\-solving skills and ability to write efficient, maintainable code.
 



 • Familiarity with version control systems like Git and collaborative development workflows.
 



 • Eagerness to learn and adapt in a fast\\-paced AI\\-driven environment.
 



  





**More About the Opportunity:** 




 This role offers a unique opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge AI systems that connect human expertise with frontier model development. The position provides global exposure, mentorship from experienced engineers, and the chance to build products used by a rapidly expanding network of domain experts. Graduates will grow quickly by owning meaningful contributions to an AI recruiter agent that powers over 1 million interviews and supports the training of reliable AI models.
 



  





**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 




 We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.
 



  





**Apply Now!**

title: Frontend Developer
description:
**About Us:** 





 We are dedicated to solving some of the most challenging problems in our industry by leveraging cutting\\-edge artificial intelligence. We believe in a product\\-led approach, rapid iteration, and building a culture of technical excellence from day one. This is a rare opportunity to get in on the ground floor and build a category\\-defining product.
 




**The Role:** 





 We are looking for a brilliant and ambitious Frontend Engineer to be a cornerstone of our company. As one of our very first engineering hires, you will have a monumental impact on our product, culture, and future success. You will be responsible for making critical architectural decisions, selecting our core technology stack, and building the initial versions of our platform from scratch.
 





 This role is for a true builder—someone who is passionate about moving fast, taking ownership, and turning ambitious ideas into robust, scalable software. You will work directly with the founders, UX designers, and our AI engineering team to create a product that not only meets but anticipates the needs of our users.
 



**Key Responsibilities:** 
* **Architect and Build:** 

 Design, develop, and deploy our core product across the full stack, from the user interface to the database.
* **Technology Leadership:** 

 Lead the evaluation and selection of our primary tech stack (languages, frameworks, AI productivity tooling) to ensure rapid development and long\\-term scalability.
* **End\\-to\\-End Ownership:** 

 Take features from concept to designs to well\\-tested code for front\\-end. Working with other members of the engineering team to ensure end to end best practices.
* **Build for Scale:** 

 Lay the foundation for a secure, scalable, and high\\-performance platform that can support future growth and a growing user base.
* **Growth focused development:** 

 Work very closely with UX designers to implement intuitive user experiences, and collaborate with the business team to ensure implementation of user analytics and hooks where needed.
* **Release management:** 

 Help establish our engineering culture by championing best practices in code quality, testing, CI/CD, and agile development.
* **Mentorship:** 

 As the team grows, you will play a key role in mentoring junior developers and helping to build a world\\-class engineering organization.


**Required Qualifications:** 
* **Professional Experience:** 


**5\\+ years** 

 of experience as a full\\-stack software engineer, with a proven track record of building and shipping complex, product\\-focused applications.
* **Technical Versatility:** 

 Strong proficiency across the stack, including:
* **Front\\-End:** 

 Hands\\-on experience of working on frontend tech on modern JavaScript frameworks, React native, React JS, TypeScript, GraphQL, JQuery, HTML, CSS, Figma
* Experience of delivering end to end mobile app development on iOS and Google Android.
* **Back\\-End:** 

 experience of working with full stack engineers with understanding of Python, NodeJS, NextJS
* **Databases:** 

 understands SQL (e.g., PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (e.g., MongoDB, DynamoDB) databases.
* **AI** 

 : AI first with experience of using tools like V0, Replit
* **API** 

 : experience with Django REST, Firebase, Python FastAPI for frontend integrations
* **Cloud and DevOps:** 

 Hands\\-on experience with a major cloud provider (AWS) and containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes).
* **Architectural Mindset:** 

 understands and builds around design systems, making trade\\-off decisions, and building for trust, scalability and security.
* **Product Sense:** 

 A strong sense of user empathy and a passion for building products that people love. You are comfortable making decisions with incomplete information and have a bias for action.


**Preferred Skills and Qualifications:** 
* **Startup Experience:** 

 Previous experience as a founding or early\\-stage engineer in a startup environment is a massive plus.
* **Strong Communicator:** 

 The ability to clearly articulate complex technical concepts to both technical and non\\-technical stakeholders.
* **Entrepreneurial Spirit:** 

 You are a natural problem\\-solver, thrive in ambiguity, and are excited by the challenges and opportunities of building a company from the ground up.


**What We Offer:** 
* A highly competitive salary and a significant, foundational equity stake.
* The opportunity to have a profound impact on our product, technology, and company culture.
* A high\\-autonomy, low\\-bureaucracy environment where you can do your best work.
* Comprehensive health, dental, and vision benefits.
* A flexible work environment that values results over hours logged.

title: Senior Cloud DevOps Engineer
description:
**About the Role** 





 Revmind Labs AI is a boutique deep\\-tech AI company building production\\-grade AI and software systems for enterprise customers, especially in pharma and CPG. We build tailored AI solutions, advanced analytics platforms, dashboards, data workflows, AI/LLM\\-powered systems, and enterprise\\-ready applications that move from idea to production.
 




  






 Revmind Labs AI is looking to fill the role of a Senior Cloud DevOps Engineer. The Senior Cloud DevOps Engineer will be responsible for developing, running, and continuously refining an easy\\-to\\-use, modern, and cost\\-effective cloud platform. This role involves leading cloud initiatives, ensuring robust cloud infrastructure, and driving innovation in cloud technologies to support the business's advanced analytics and AI needs.
 




  





**Primary Job Function** 





 The Senior Cloud DevOps Engineer will be responsible for developing, running, and continuously refining a modern, cost\\-effective, secure, and scalable cloud platform. The role will support Revmind's advanced analytics, AI, data science, and enterprise product development needs by ensuring robust cloud infrastructure, stable deployment workflows, secure data handling, and reliable platform operations.
 




  





**Core Job Responsibilities** 



* Support the development and maintenance of company\\-wide frameworks and libraries that enable faster, better, and more informed decision\\-making within the business, creating significant business value from data and analytics.
* Ensure data availability and accessibility for prioritized Advanced Analytics scope, and maintain stable, scalable, and modular data science pipelines from data exploration to deployment.
* Acquire, ingest, and process data from multiple sources and systems into our cloud platform, especially AWS, ensuring data integrity and security.
* Collaborate with data scientists to map data fields to hypotheses, and curate, wrangle, and prepare data for advanced analytical models.
* Implement and manage robust security measures to ensure compliant handling and management of data, including access strategies aligned with Information Security, Cyber Security, and Data Privacy principles.
* Develop and deploy smart automation tools based on cloud technologies, aligned with business priorities and needs.
* Oversee the timely delivery of Advanced Analytics solutions in collaboration with business stakeholders, ensuring alignment with business goals.
* Collaborate closely with the Data Science team and AI Engineers to understand their platform needs and lead the development of solutions that support their work.
* Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to the AWS platform, ensuring minimal downtime and optimal performance.
* Define and document best practices and strategies regarding application deployment and infrastructure maintenance.
* Drive continuous improvement of the AWS Cloud platform by contributing and implementing new ideas and processes.



  





**Supervisory / Management Responsibilities** 





 Direct Reports: None
 





 Indirect Reports: None
 




  





**Position Accountability / Scope** 





 The Senior Cloud DevOps Engineer is accountable for delivering targeted business impact per initiative in collaboration with key stakeholders. This role involves significant responsibility for the architecture and management of Revmind's strategic cloud platforms and AI / Advanced Analytics programs, enabling faster, better, and more informed decision\\-making within the business.
 




  





**Minimum Education** 





 Master's degree in a relevant field, such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or related technical discipline.
 




  





**Minimum Experience** 



* At least 4\\+ years of relevant experience, with a strong track record in deploying solutions and applications on an AWS cloud environment.
* Proven ability to work across structured, semi\\-structured, and unstructured data, extracting information and identifying linkages across disparate data sets.
* Proficiency in multiple programming languages such as JavaScript, Python, Scala, or Java.
* Extensive knowledge and experience with various database technologies, including distributed processing frameworks, relational databases, MPP databases, and NoSQL data stores.
* Deep understanding of Information Security principles to ensure compliant handling and management of data.
* Significant experience with cloud platforms, preferably AWS and its ecosystem.
* Advanced knowledge of development in CI/CD environments.
* Strong background in data warehousing and ETL tools.
* Proficiency in DevOps practices and tools such as Jenkins, Terraform, and related technologies.
* Proficiency in serverless architecture and services such as AWS Lambda.
* Understanding of security best practices and implementation in cloud environments.
* Ability to understand business objectives and create cloud\\-based solutions to meet those objectives.
* Result\\-driven, analytical, and creative thinker.
* Proven ability to work with cross\\-functional teams and bridge the gap between business and data science.
* Fluency in English is a must; additional languages are a plus.



  





**Additional Technical Skills** 



* Experience with front\\-end frameworks, preferably React JS.
* Knowledge of back\\-end frameworks such as Django, Flask, or Node.js.
* Familiarity with database technologies such as Redshift, MySQL, or DynamoDB.
* Understanding of RESTful API design and development.
* Experience with version control systems such as CodeCommit or similar tools.



  





**Tech Stack Exposure** 





 Cloud : AWS, AWS Lambda, API Gateway, S3, RDS, DynamoDB, Redshift, CloudWatch, X\\-Ray
 





 DevOps : CI/CD, Jenkins, Terraform, deployment automation, serverless architecture
 





 Data Platforms : Data pipelines, ETL, data warehousing, distributed processing, MPP databases
 





 Backend / APIs : Python, JavaScript, Scala, Java, Django, Flask, Node.js, RESTful APIs
 





 Database : Relational databases, NoSQL data stores, MySQL, DynamoDB, Redshift
 





 Security : Information Security, Cyber Security, Data Privacy, access management
 





 AI / Analytics : Advanced analytics, data science pipelines, AI/AA programs, cloud platform support
 




  





**Compensation, Benefits, and Growth** 





 Compensation will be up to 20 LPA. This is an opportunity to work on production\\-grade AI, advanced analytics, cloud\\-connected applications, enterprise workflows, and scalable frontend systems at Revmind Labs AI.
 




  






 For India\\-based candidates, benefits may include:
 



* Remote\\-first work setup, with practical flexibility around working hours where delivery and collaboration needs are met.
* Paid time off, sick leave, and applicable Indian public holidays.
* Health insurance support or medical benefits, depending on employment structure and company policy.
* Learning and upskilling support for relevant engineering, cloud, AI, product, and backend development areas.
* Home\\-office, equipment, or software support where applicable to the role.
* Opportunity to work directly with founders and senior stakeholders on high\\-impact AI and analytics products.
* Unusual growth opportunity as Revmind Labs AI scales its product, engineering culture, delivery standards, and GTM\\-stage trajectory.
* A serious builder environment with high ownership, direct feedback, low ego teamwork, and meaningful technical problems.



  





**Career Gaps and Non\\-Linear Paths** 





 Career gaps or non\\-linear paths are not a problem. If you have taken a break for personal, family, health, caregiving, relocation, layoff\\-related, professional, or other reasons, that will not count against you by default. We care more about what you can build now, how you think, how you learn, how you handle feedback, and how you work with others.
 




  





**How to Apply** 





 Please apply via LinkedIn with your updated CV/resume.
 





 Optional: Include relevant backend, Python, AWS, data platform, API, or analytics product experience, along with GitHub repositories, architecture notes, deployment examples, or case studies of relevant work.
